rows.notes: R60 runs only under the explicit H55 useful-kernel reentry packet.
All admitted sum/count preserved useful-kernel rows must keep exact source/spec/lowered and linear/accelerated internal execution parity.
Compiled tiny-C lowering should stay translation-identical to the preserved canonical rows on the admitted suite.
The carryover gate remains fixed to sum_i32_buffer and count_nonzero_i32_buffer only.
